data.title: ETH record exchange outflows clash with rising short positions – a turning point?
data.description:
This analysis deep dives into the main factors impacting Ethereum’s price trends and provides an outlook of future developments.

data.title: BNB Chain: Bscscan will stop maintenance soon, users are advised to use bsctrace to review transactions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BNB Chain posted on the X platform that Bscscan will stop maintenance soon, and recommends users to use https://bsctrace.com and https://oklink.com/bsc to review transactions.

data.title: LBank will list yellow ket (KET)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch yellow ket (KET) at 17:30 (SGT) on February 14, and open KET/USDT trading pairs. The deposit service will be opened at 17:00 on February 14, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 17:00 on February 15.

data.title: Aave Achieves Record Revenue in January 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from DefiLlama indicates that Aave reached a record revenue of nearly $12 million in January 2025. This marks the highest monthly revenue in the platform's history.

data.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Recent Mass Theft Incident
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine posted on Platform X, stating, "Today's mass theft incident remains uncertain regarding which entity was compromised. Based on our speculation, it could be due to historical data leaks from various sources, leading to today's concentrated thefts, which explains the uncertainty about the specific entity involved."

data.title: Slow Mist Yuxian: Today's group theft incident may be the result of previous leaks through multiple channels.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Slow Mist Yuxian posted on the X platform: "It is not certain which company was the victim of today's group theft. According to our speculation, it may be a leak from various channels in the past, and the theft was concentrated today, so it is not certain which company was the victim."

data.title: Funds lost in pig butchering crypto scams soared 40% in 2024: Chainalysis
data.description:
Peer-to-peer marketplace Huione Guarantee has become a go-to place for crypto scammers for infrastructure and money laundering.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340858/funds-lost-in-pig-butchering-crypto-scams-soared-40-in-2024-chainalysis?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Megabit will launch IP/USDT 1-75x contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will officially launch IP/USDT 1-75x contract trading at 18:00 (SGT) on February 7.

data.title: Bitcoin Close to Breakout as One ‘Reliable’ Signal Turns Bullish, Says Trader – Here Are His Targets
data.description:
Analyst and trader Kevin Svenson is leaning bullish on Bitcoin (BTC) as the crypto king hovers below a price of $100,000. In a new video, Svenson tells his 82,300 YouTube subscribers that the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicator, which is used to determine oversold or overbought market conditions, is signaling a move to the upside […]
The post Bitcoin Close to Breakout as One ‘Reliable’...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/14/bitcoin-close-to-breakout-as-one-reliable-signal-turns-bullish-says-trader-here-are-his-targets/

data.title: GoPlus Users Report Asset Theft Exceeding $1 Million
data.description: According to Foresight News, GoPlus users have reported the theft of some of their assets. Security monitoring has identified the address involved in the theft as newly created yesterday. The stolen assets, amounting to over $1 million, have been transferred to the address 0x49add3e8329f2a2f507238b0a684d03eae205aab. GoPlus suspects that the theft may be due to the mass compromise of private keys belonging to users of a trading platform or trading bot. Users are advised to promptly check the security of their wallet assets.
